title: Cobblemon Quick Battle
description: Send your pokemon to attack the targeted wild pokemon for a quick battle, like the Let's Go feature in scarlet and violet
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- _**I grant permission to anyone seeking to add my mod to a modpack**_ --- Cobblemon Quick Battle brings Pokemon Scarlet/Violet's "Let's Go" feature to Cobblemon! Battle wild Pokemon instantly without entering the full battle screen. **SUPPORTS COBBLEMON: 1.7+** ### Features: - Keyboard and controller support with configurable keybinds - **Win Chance %:** - Your Pokémon's stats vs the wild Pokémon's stats - Type effectiveness (super effective, not very effective, immunities) - STAB (Same Type Attack Bonus) - 1st active move, power, and category (physical/special) - Level difference - **HUD Overlay:** - Pokémon name and level - Distance from pokemon - Estimated win chance % - EV yields - **Sound Effect:** - Attack hit - Super effective hits - Not very effective hits - Immune (no effect) - Victory (with XP sound) - Defeat - Shiny detection with gold visual indicator and warning to battle normally - Status move warning when your first move slot contains a non-damaging move **- Automatically filters out:** - Your own party Pokémon - Pokémon currently in battle - Pokémon being captured - Owned Pokémon ### Config Options: - EV Yield: Toggle whether EVs are awarded from quick battles (default: ON) - XP Gain: Toggle whether XP is awarded from quick battles (default: ON) - Target Distance: (Default: 32) - Cooldown: Time between quick battles (Off / 1s / 2s / 3s / 5s, default: 2s) - Overlay Position: Bottom-Left / Top-Left / Top-Right / Bottom-Right (default: Top-Left) - Controller Button: Any button (default: Y) - Keyboard Key: Any key (default: G)
